root_text.sn14.25:2.1: Pāṇātipātā paṭiviratā pāṇātipātā paṭiviratehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti;
root_text.sn14.25:2.2: adinnādānā paṭiviratā adinnādānā paṭiviratehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti;
root_text.sn14.25:2.3: kāmesumicchācārā paṭiviratā kāmesumicchācārā paṭiviratehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti;
root_text.sn14.25:2.4: musāvādā paṭiviratā musāvādā paṭiviratehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samenti;
root_text.sn14.25:2.5: surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhānā paṭiviratā surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhānā paṭiviratehi saddhiṁ saṁsandanti samentī”ti.

translation_text.sn14.25:1.2: “Mendicants, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element:
translation_text.sn14.25:1.3: those who kill living creatures with those who kill living creatures,
translation_text.sn14.25:1.7: consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants …
translation_text.sn14.25:2.1: Those who refrain from killing living creatures …
translation_text.sn14.25:2.5: those who refrain from consuming beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants with those who refrain from consuming beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.”
